name: Allison Miller
description: American jazz drummer, composer and bandleader
abstract: Allison Miller (born 1974 or 1975) is an American, New York City-based drummer, composer, and teacher.

concerts.label: Artemis
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Virginia Mayhew
about_quotes.evidence: The first time it was a trio, Allison Miller and Gary Wang. And the next time it was a quartet with — who did I take — Harvie S., Allison Miller and Daniel Kelley on piano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Virginia Mayhew interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 23, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: There’s another group I play with too that Ellen Rowe... started... Allison Miller on drums, the front line Ingrid Jensen...
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021
